title: Installed ordinary-path walkthrough for #1389 Milestone D
goal: Produce installed-product evidence for #1430 and #1411, then decide whether #1389 can honestly close or whether a final routable gap remains.
scope: skill payload and generated/reference surface posture
non_goals: implement broad lower-surface cleanup inside the walkthrough
treat package docs or command inventory as the ordinary workflow

references.label: Gate #1389 closure with abstraction-ladder and installed-path proof
Finish ordinary output-shape compression before #1389 closure

summary: Milestone D evidence shows the installed ordinary path is materially simpler than the pre-epic surface model: first contact is AGENTS.md to start, active work routes through summary or implement, proof routes through proof selection, and closeout exposes parent/residue boundaries. #1389 should not close yet because operational_compression still reports seven ordinary output surfaces whose primary decision objects need separate compression/audit slices.
validation_commands: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py start --task "Milestone D installed ordinary-path walkthrough for #1430/#1411/#1389" --select next_safe_action.next_safe_action,next_safe_action.why,action_signals.hard_blockers,action_signals.allowed_next_action --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --select todo.active_items,planning_surface_health.status,warning_count --format json

uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/lane-1389-installed-workflow-closeout-review.plan.json --task "Record installed ordinary-path walkthrough evidence for #1430 and #1411" --select action_signals,next,proof,context.scope,context.acceptance_reconciliation,context.parent_intent_status --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py proof --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/lane-1389-installed-workflow-closeout-review.plan.json --format json

uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section closeout_trust --select answer.trust,answer.completion_options,answer.checks.intent_satisfaction,answer.closeout_protocol.closure_permission,answer.closeout_protocol.residue_routing --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --section operational_compression --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py skills --target . --task "Milestone D installed ordinary-path walkthrough for #1430/#1411/#1389" --format json

review_method.ordinary_output_shape_gap: {"source":"report --section operational_compression","status":"blocking-parent-closure","proven_count":1,"remaining_count":7,"remaining_surfaces":["implement","summary","preflight","report","proof","planning report/summary","memory report/promotion-report"],"required_follow_up":"#1437 compresses/audits primary decision objects for the remaining routed ordinary outputs before #1389 closure."}

findings.title: installed ordinary path is materially simpler and routed
findings.summary: First contact is AGENTS.md to start, active work routes through summary or implement, proof routes through proof selection, and closeout exposes parent/residue boundaries.
findings.evidence: start selected continue-active-planning-record; implement --changed selected a scoped changed-path card and proof commands; proof --changed selected required validation; closeout_trust blocked broad/parent closure while routing residue.
findings.suggested action: Use this as #1430 installed-path evidence for #1411, but keep #1389 open until the remaining output-shape gap is resolved.

findings.title: ordinary output-shape compression remains the final #1389 gap
findings.summary: operational_compression reports ordinary_output_shape_inventory.remaining_count = 7; start is proven but implement, summary, preflight, report, proof, planning report/summary, and memory report/promotion-report still need primary-decision-object compression or retention evidence.
findings.evidence: {"source":"report --section operational_compression","status":"blocking-parent-closure","proven_count":1,"remaining_count":7,"remaining_surfaces":["implement","summary","preflight","report","proof","planning report/summary","memory report/promotion-report"],"required_follow_up":"#1437 compresses/audits primary decision objects for the remaining routed ordinary outputs before #1389 closure."}
findings.suggested action: Route #1437 as the final Milestone D follow-up and keep #1411/#1389 open until it lands or is explicitly dismissed with evidence.

recommendation.issue_1430: satisfied once this evidence is linked; final output-shape follow-up #1437 has been created
recommendation.issue_1411: not complete yet; it should remain open as the #1389 closure gate until the final follow-up lands or is explicitly dismissed
recommendation.issue_1389: must remain open; current GitHub state was corrected by reopening it during this walkthrough
recommendation.why: The installed path is visibly simpler and correctly routed, but command-surface abstraction-ladder coverage is not complete while seven ordinary outputs still need primary-decision-object compression or explicit retention evidence.
